ground_truth.title: Fast Track Careers | Academic and Career Programs | Austin Community College District
ground_truth.main_content:
Train for a new career quickly and affordably at Austin Community College. ACC's Fast Track Career Certificates can give you a helpful edge in the job market by equipping you with the in-demand skills Central Texas employers need now. Noncredit and for-credit certificate options are available to help you achieve fast results and long term success.

Noncredit Certificates — 50% Discount: ACC's Continuing Education Division offers noncredit skill certificates that prepare you to start a new career or advance in your current profession even faster. Register now and save 50% on the cost of most programs. Financial assistance also may be available.

Business programs include: Accounting & Bookkeeping ($495, 12 Weeks, $14.52-$20.64/hr), Administrative Assistant ($723, 8 Weeks, $12.79-$20.27/hr), Project Manager ($1,249.50, 12 Weeks, $16.70-$46.90/hr), Translation & Interpreting ($592, 3 Semesters, $19.31-$38.51/hr).

Design, Manufacturing, Construction & Applied Technologies programs include: Automotive Mechanic ($598, 12 Weeks), Certified CAD Drafter ($996, 10 Weeks, $17.87-$27.13/hr), Certified Production Technician ($1,100, 4-8 Weeks), Heavy Equipment Operator ($1,975, 3 Weeks), HVAC ($1,450, 12 Weeks), Lineworker ($1,461, 6 Weeks), Plumbing ($1,399.50, 5 Months), Truck Driving ($4,500, 5 Weeks), Welding ($900, 12 Weeks).

Education: Paraeducator ($126.50, 3 Weeks, $8.91-$11.81/hr).

Information Technology programs include: Cisco Certified Network Associate ($2,608.50, 6 Months, $18.21-$33.10/hr), CompTIA Security+ ($297.50, 12 Weeks, $18.71-$36.61/hr), Information Security ($447.50, 56 Hours), PC Technician ($1,150, 3-6 Months), Software Developer Bootcamp ($8,600, 6 Months, $16.86-$34.51/hr), Web Developer ($1,980, 12 Months).

Health Sciences programs include: Certified Nurse Aide ($554, 12 Weeks, $8.09-$10.33/hr), Dental Assistant ($2,099, 12 Months, $13.77-$20.11/hr), Medical Assistant ($3,837, 6-12 Months, $12.78-$16.65/hr), Medical Billing & Coding ($2,875, 9 Months, $12.79-$16.94/hr), Medical Office Support ($1,161, 1 Semester), Phlebotomy Technician ($900, 12 Weeks, $8.33-$16.40/hr), Veterinary Assistant ($1,988.50, 12 Months).

ACC Career Services offers a free, 4-week course called Strategies for Today's Jobs. You'll learn to find job openings, write a successful resume, and land interviews.

Ready to get started: For noncredit certificates, visit the Continuing Education registration page or contact 512-223-7542. For for-credit certificates, visit the for-credit registration page or contact 512-223-4636.
